name: Synthesis Overreach review for Acceptable Use Operational Training Augmentation Update bundle
summary: Accepted. The staged claim adds the operational augmentation category without converting it into a broad high-stakes validation or policy claim. Limitations, blockers, and applicability fields all preserve the remaining uncertainty.

findings.claim_or_issue: The update is appropriately framed as a narrow change to acceptable training augmentation, not as a general endorsement of synthetic responses in operational automated scoring.
findings.why_it_matters: The broader synthesis should help users distinguish permissible workflow support from unsupported validation shortcuts.
findings.recommended_action: Retain the staged blockers and final-validation exclusions.
